text.title: Decision Process and Agent Limitations
text.summary: Weighted matrix methodology, migration risk assessment, and critical agent limitations for platform analysis.

section.title: Decision Matrix Methodology
section.p: Score each platform on weighted criteria: real-time collaboration (25%), AI-assisted UI design (20%), developer handoff (20%), asset/image generation (15%), print/brand production (10%), enterprise security/SSO (10%). Weight allocation must be adjusted per team context before scoring.
section.reference: Weighted scoring table for Figma vs Adobe across 7 criteria

rule.statement: Audit SSO, SCIM provisioning, and data residency requirements before enterprise recommendations. Both platforms differ significantly on these dimensions.
rule.rationale: Enterprise security and compliance requirements can disqualify a platform entirely regardless of feature score; these must be verified before presenting a recommendation.

rule.statement: Require human verification of all pricing figures before presenting to finance. Agent-generated cost calculations use list pricing; enterprise pricing is negotiated and can differ by 30–50%.
rule.rationale: Presenting list pricing as enterprise pricing is a frequent cause of stakeholder distrust in tool recommendations.

antipattern.description: Agent comparison includes Adobe XD as a current product.
antipattern.reason: Adobe XD was deprecated in 2023; correct to Adobe Express or Creative Cloud apps. This is a persistent agent error that must be explicitly checked.

antipattern.description: Agent makes feature parity claims without citing a verifiable source and date.
antipattern.reason: Feature parity claims (e.g., "Figma now matches Adobe in vector tools") are frequently inaccurate by the time an agent is queried; require human fact-check against current product pages.

antipattern.description: Agent underestimates migration effort for large Figma component libraries with complex variable/token structures.
antipattern.reason: Agents have no reliable model of Figma library migration complexity; always require a human estimate based on actual component and variable counts.

section.title: Prompt References
section.reference: Prompt for team-context comparison and weighted recommendation
Prompt for structured migration risk report
